title: plumeria emarginata
intro: Plumeria emarginata, also known as the yellow frangipani, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are said to aid in treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The plant is also believed to have several health benefits, including reducing stress, improving sleep, and boosting the immune system, due to its antioxidant and adaptogenic properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
